flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 36% at La Salle University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (2.0k vs 3.1k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at La Salle University fell 26% between 2021 and 2024 (2.7k → 2.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at La Salle University rose 18% between 2006 and 2009 ($27.7k → $32.7k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at La Salle University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($33.1k → $37.8k).
